nasb.text: Break forth, shout joyfully together, You waste places of Jerusalem; For the Lord has comforted His people, He has redeemed Jerusalem.

esv.text: Break forth together into singing, you waste places of Jerusalem, for the Lord has comforted his people; he has redeemed Jerusalem.

cnv.text: 耶路撒冷的廢墟啊！ 你們要發聲，一同歡呼。 因為耶和華安慰了他的子民， 救贖了耶路撒冷。

ccb.text: 耶路撒冷的荒场啊， 你们要一同欢呼歌唱， 因为耶和华安慰了祂的子民， 救赎了耶路撒冷。

csbs.text: 耶路撒冷的废墟啊， 要放声一同欢唱！ 因为耶和华安慰了他的子民， 救赎了耶路撒冷。
